# pairion-client — Codebase Audit

**Audit Date:** 2026-04-26T15:25:52Z
**Generated By:** Claude Code (claude-sonnet-4-6) following Codebase-Audit-Template.md
**Note:** C++20 Qt6 desktop client. Template adapted — no JPA/entities/repositories/REST controllers. Sections inapplicable to this architecture are explicitly marked N/A with rationale.

---

## 1. Project Identity

```
Project Name:        Pairion-Client
Repository URL:      https://github.com/anomalyco/Pairion-Client
Primary Language:    C++20 with Qt 6.6+ and QML

Build Tool:          CMake 4.2.3 with Ninja 1.13.2 generator
```

## 2. Directory Structure

```
./CMakeLists.txt                         Main CMake build file
./CMakePresets.json                      Platform presets (10 configure/build/test presets)
./resources.qrc                          Qt resource file
./resources/model_manifest.json         ONNX model URLs + SHA-256 hashes
./Architecture.md                        Legacy architecture doc
./Client-Architecture.md                Client architecture doc
./Pairion-Layer-Architecture.md         Layer system architecture (active)
./Pairion-Scene-Architecture.md         Scene architecture (superseded)
./CONVENTIONS.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md

./src/
  core/
    constants.h                          App-wide compile-time constants
    device_identity.h/.cpp               QSettings-persisted UUID device ID + bearer token
    model_downloader.h/.cpp              Downloads + SHA-256 verifies ONNX models
    onnx_session.h/.cpp                  Abstract OnnxInferenceSession + OrtInferenceSession
    version.h.in                         Version string injected by CMake configure_file
  protocol/
    messages.h                           All WS message structs + OutboundMessage/InboundMessage variants
    envelope_codec.h/.cpp                JSON text-frame serializer/deserializer
    binary_codec.h/.cpp                  4-byte stream-ID prefix + Opus payload codec
  audio/
    pairion_audio_capture.h/.cpp         QAudioSource wrapper — 20 ms PCM frames at 16 kHz mono
    pairion_audio_playback.h/.cpp        QAudioSink wrapper with jitter buffer for TTS
    pairion_opus_encoder.h/.cpp          libopus encoder (28 kbps, complexity 5)
    pairion_opus_decoder.h/.cpp          libopus decoder
    ring_buffer.h                        Lock-free ring buffer (header-only)
  wake/
    open_wakeword_detector.h/.cpp        openWakeWord 3-model ONNX pipeline (mel→emb→cls)
  vad/
    silero_vad.h/.cpp                    Silero VAD v5 ONNX wrapper, Idle/Speaking/Trailing FSM
  ws/
    pairion_websocket_client.h/.cpp      QWebSocket client — identify, heartbeat, exponential backoff
  pipeline/
    audio_session_orchestrator.h/.cpp    Main FSM: Idle→AwaitingWake→Streaming→EndingSpeech→Idle
    pipeline_health_monitor.h/.cpp       Periodic health checker + recovery surface
  state/
    connection_state.h/.cpp              QML singleton — all WS/pipeline state + layer properties
  settings/
    settings.h/.cpp                      QSettings-backed runtime params (wake/VAD thresholds, audio device)
  util/
    logger.h/.cpp                        Qt message handler — structured JSON log batching → POST /v1/logs
  main.cpp                               Application entry point

./qml/
  Main.qml                               Root ApplicationWindow — HUD/debug toggle, keyboard shortcuts
  HUD/
    PairionHUD.qml                       Top-level HUD container
    LayerManager.qml                     Background + overlay compositor (dynamic QML loading)
    RingSystem.qml                       Animated ring visualisation
    TopBar.qml                           Status bar
    TranscriptStrip.qml                  STT/LLM transcript display
    FpsCounter.qml                       Performance counter
    DashboardPanel.qml / DashboardPanels.qml  Four dashboard panels (placeholder data)
    HemisphereMap.qml                    Mini hemisphere widget
    PipelineHealthIndicator.qml          Health status visual
  Backgrounds/
    GlobeBackground.qml                  NASA globe (default)
    SpaceBackground.qml                  Star-field
    OsmBackground.qml                    OpenStreetMap dark tiles
    VfrBackground.qml                    VFR sectional chart
    DarkBackground.qml                   Solid dark
  Overlays/
    AdsbOverlay.qml                      ADS-B aircraft radar (implemented)
    WeatherRadarOverlay.qml              RainViewer animated radar tiles (implemented)
    WeatherCurrentOverlay.qml            Current weather conditions (STUB)
    MarkersOverlay.qml                   Generic map markers (STUB)
    NewsPinsOverlay.qml                  News pin markers (STUB)
  PairionScene/
    BackgroundBase.qml / OverlayBase.qml  Base contracts (legacy)
    HudLabel.qml / HudPanel.qml / PairionStyle.qml  Shared style
  Debug/
    DebugPanel.qml                       F12 debug overlay
  Scenes/                                Legacy scene YAML descriptors (superseded)

./test/                                  19 QtTest unit/integration test executables
./cmake/                                 check_coverage.cmake, filter_coverage.cmake
./platform/macos/                        macOS Info.plist
./scripts/install/                       Install helpers
```

**Narrative:** Single-module CMake project. C++ backend in `src/` provides audio pipeline, ONNX inference, WebSocket client, and state. QML in `qml/` provides a full-screen cinematic HUD. No database, no REST server, no message broker — this is a pure thin client.

## 3. Build & Dependency Manifest

**Build file:** `CMakeLists.txt`

### Dependencies

| Dependency | Version | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| Qt6::Core | 6.5+ (6.6+ in practice) | QObject, QTimer, QString, QSettings, QThread |
| Qt6::Quick | 6.5+ | QML engine, QQmlApplicationEngine |
| Qt6::Network | 6.5+ | QNetworkAccessManager, HTTP POST for log forwarding |
| Qt6::WebSockets | 6.5+ | QWebSocket — server connection |
| Qt6::Multimedia | 6.5+ | QAudioSource (capture), QAudioSink (playback), QMediaDevices |
| Qt6::Test | 6.5+ | QtTest framework for all 19 test executables |
| Qt6::ShaderTools | 6.5+ | qsb shader compilation |
| libopus | system (via pkg-config) | Opus audio codec encode/decode |
| onnxruntime | system | ONNX inference for wake word + VAD models |
| PkgConfig | system | Locates libopus |

### Build Targets

| Target | Type | Sources |
|---|---|---|
| `pairion_core` | STATIC library | All src/ except main.cpp — testable unit |
| `pairion` | Executable (macOS bundle) | main.cpp + resources.qrc, links pairion_core |
| `tst_*` (×19) | Test executables | Per-module QtTest binaries, each link pairion_core |

### Build Commands

```
Configure (macOS arm64 debug):  cmake --preset macos-arm64-debug
Build:                          cmake --build --preset macos-arm64-debug
Test:                           ctest --preset macos-arm64-debug
Coverage:                       cmake --build --preset macos-arm64-debug --target coverage
Release build (macOS arm64):    cmake --preset macos-arm64-release && cmake --build --preset macos-arm64-release
```

### CMake Options

| Option | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `PAIRION_COVERAGE` | OFF (ON in debug presets) | LCOV coverage instrumentation |
| `PAIRION_WAKE_DIAGNOSTICS` | OFF | Info-level wake score logging |
| `PAIRION_CLIENT_NATIVE_TESTS` | OFF | Tests requiring real ONNX model files |
| `PAIRION_COVERAGE_THRESHOLD` | 100 | Minimum line coverage % |

### Compiler Flags (all presets)

macOS/Linux: `-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Werror`
Windows: `/W4 /WX`

### Windows

Uses vcpkg toolchain file from `$VCPKG_ROOT`. macOS uses Homebrew at `/opt/homebrew` (arm64) or `/usr/local` (x86_64).

**Environment variables:** None detected. Server URLs and ports are compile-time constants in `src/core/constants.h`:
```cpp
kDefaultServerUrl    = "ws://localhost:18789/ws/v1"
kDefaultRestBaseUrl  = "http://localhost:18789/v1"
```

**Device credentials:** Stored in `QSettings` (platform-native on macOS = plist in `~/Library/Preferences/`). UUID device ID + bearer token generated on first launch.

**CI/CD:** None detected. No `.github/workflows`, `Jenkinsfile`, or `.gitlab-ci.yml`.

## 5. Startup & Runtime Behavior

**Entry point:** `src/main.cpp` → `main(int argc, char *argv[])`

**Startup sequence:**

1. `QGuiApplication` created; application name/version/org set from `kClientVersion`
2. `QNetworkAccessManager`, `ConnectionState` (QML singleton), `Settings` (QML singleton) constructed
3. `pairion::util::Logger` constructed + `.install()` — installs Qt message handler, starts 30s flush timer
4. `DeviceIdentity` loaded or generated (UUID device ID + bearer token via QSettings)
5. `PairionWebSocketClient` constructed with server URL + credentials
6. `PairionAudioCapture` constructed on main thread (macOS requires QAudioSource on main thread)
7. `PairionOpusEncoder` constructed; `moveToThread(encoderThread)` — CPU-bound Opus encoding
8. `QThread inferenceThread` created — will host wake detector + VAD (queued connections)
9. QML singletons registered: `ConnectionState`, `Settings`
10. `QQmlApplicationEngine` loads `qrc:/qml/Main.qml`
11. `ModelDownloader` constructed; `wsClient.sessionOpened` → `modelDownloader.checkAndDownload()`
12. Microphone permission requested via `QMicrophonePermission` / `QPermission` API
13. `wsClient.connectToServer()` called (connects regardless of mic permission)

**Pipeline start condition:** Both `micPermissionGranted AND modelsReady` must be true → `initAudioPipeline()`

**`initAudioPipeline()` sequence:**

1. Load 4 ONNX sessions: `melspectrogram.onnx`, `embedding_model.onnx`, `hey_jarvis_v0.1.onnx`, `silero_vad.onnx`
   - On failure: retry up to 3 times with 1s delay; on exhaustion → `pipelineHealth = "models_failed"`
2. Construct `OpenWakewordDetector` + `SileroVad` on inferenceThread
3. Construct `PairionAudioPlayback` on main thread
4. Construct `AudioSessionOrchestrator` (main thread)
5. Wire signal connections: capture → encoder (queued), capture → wakeDetector (queued), capture → vad (queued)
6. Start `inferenceThread` + `encoderThread`; verify both `.isRunning()`
7. Queue `wakeDetector.warmup()` on inferenceThread
8. `capture.start()` + `orchestrator.startListening()`
9. `pipelineHealth = "ready"`
10. Construct + start `PipelineHealthMonitor` (initial check at 5s, then every 30s)

**Pipeline health states:**
`connecting` → `models_loading` → `initializing` → `ready`
Error paths: `mic_offline`, `wake_failed`, `server_disconnected`, `models_failed`, `pipeline_error`

**Scheduled tasks:**
- Logger flush timer: every 30s (POST /v1/logs)
- Heartbeat timer: every 15s (HeartbeatPing → server)
- Reconnect timer: exponential backoff 1s → 2s → 4s → 8s → 15s → 30s
- Health monitor: 5s warm-up, then every 30s
- Streaming timeout: 30s safety cap per audio stream

**Shutdown:** `inferenceThread.quit() + wait()`, `encoderThread.quit() + wait()`, `delete encoder`

**Health check endpoint:** N/A — desktop client, no HTTP server

## 6. Data Model / Entity Layer

**N/A — no database, no ORM, no entities.** This is a desktop client with no persistent data store beyond QSettings. The data model is in-memory state held by `ConnectionState` (see Section 9).

**In-memory state structures (not DB entities):**

### ConnectionState (file: src/state/connection_state.h)
Singleton QObject exposing all runtime state to QML via Q_PROPERTY bindings.

| Property | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `status` | Status enum | Disconnected | Disconnected/Connecting/Connected/Reconnecting |
| `sessionId` | QString | "" | From SessionOpened |
| `serverVersion` | QString | "" | From SessionOpened |
| `reconnectAttempts` | int | 0 | Incremented on each reconnect attempt |
| `recentLogs` | QStringList | [] | Trimmed to 10 entries |
| `transcriptPartial` | QString | "" | In-progress STT text |
| `transcriptFinal` | QString | "" | Final STT text |
| `llmResponse` | QString | "" | Accumulated LLM token stream |
| `agentState` | QString | "" | idle / listening / thinking / speaking |
| `voiceState` | QString | "" | idle / awaiting_wake / streaming / ending_speech |
| `backgroundContext` | QString | "earth" | HUD background context |
| `mapFocusActive` | bool | false | Server-driven map focus |
| `mapFocusLat/Lon` | double | 0.0 | Focus coordinates |
| `mapFocusLabel` | QString | "" | Human-readable location |
| `mapFocusZoom` | QString | "" | continent / country / region / city |
| `activeBackgroundId` | QString | "globe" | Active background layer ID |
| `activeOverlayIds` | QStringList | [] | Ordered overlay stack |
| `sceneData` | QVariantMap | {} | modelId → data (QVariantMap or QVariantList) |
| `backgroundParams` | QVariantMap | {} | Params from last BackgroundChange |
| `overlayParams` | QVariantMap | {} | overlayId → params map |
| `sceneTransition` | QString | "crossfade" | crossfade / instant |
| `pipelineHealth` | QString | "connecting" | Health state string |

### Settings (file: src/settings/settings.h)
QSettings-backed QObject. Reads from platform-native settings on startup; writes back immediately on change.

| Property | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `wakeThreshold` | double | Wake word detection confidence threshold |
| `vadSilenceEndMs` | int | Milliseconds of silence before speech ends |
| `vadThreshold` | double | VAD speech probability threshold |
| `audioInputDevice` | QString | Configured mic device ID (empty = system default) |
| `audioSampleRate` | int | Configured sample rate in Hz |

## 7. Enum / Constant Inventory

### ConnectionState::Status (file: src/state/connection_state.h)
```
Values: Disconnected (0), Connecting (1), Connected (2), Reconnecting (3)
Used in: ConnectionState::status Q_PROPERTY; WebSocket client state transitions
Has display label: NO (integer enum; QML binds to int value)
Serialization: Q_ENUM — Qt meta-object introspection only; not serialized to/from JSON
```

### AudioSessionOrchestrator::State (file: src/pipeline/audio_session_orchestrator.h)
```
Values: Idle, AwaitingWake, Streaming, EndingSpeech
Used in: AudioSessionOrchestrator::m_state (internal FSM, not QML-exposed)
Has display label: NO
Serialization: Not serialized — internal C++ enum class
```

### SileroVad::VadState (file: src/vad/silero_vad.h)
```
Values: Idle, Speaking, Trailing
Used in: SileroVad::m_state (internal VAD FSM)
Has display label: NO
Serialization: Not serialized — internal C++ enum class
```

### Compile-time constants (file: src/core/constants.h)
```
kDefaultServerUrl        = "ws://localhost:18789/ws/v1"
kDefaultRestBaseUrl      = "http://localhost:18789/v1"
kHeartbeatIntervalMs     = 15000
kHeartbeatDeadlineMs     = 10000
kLogFlushIntervalMs      = 30000
kReconnectBackoffMs[]    = {1000, 2000, 4000, 8000, 15000, 30000}
kReconnectBackoffSteps   = 6
kPcmFrameBytes           = 640   (20 ms at 16 kHz, mono, 16-bit)
kPreRollBytes            = 6400  (~200 ms)
kStreamingTimeoutMs      = 30000
kWakeSuppressionMs       = 500
```

### Message type discriminators (file: src/protocol/messages.h)
Static constexpr `kType` strings on each struct — used as JSON `type` field discriminator:

**Outbound:** DeviceIdentify, HeartbeatPing, WakeWordDetected, AudioStreamStart, SpeechEnded, AudioStreamEnd, TextMessage

**Inbound:** SessionOpened, SessionClosed, HeartbeatPong, Error, AgentStateChange, TranscriptPartial, TranscriptFinal, LlmTokenStream, ToolCallStarted, ToolCallCompleted, AudioStreamStart (out), AudioStreamEnd (out), UnderBreathAck, MapFocus, MapClear, BackgroundChange, OverlayAdd, OverlayRemove, OverlayClear, SceneDataPush

## 8. Data Access / Repository Layer

**N/A — no database, no ORM, no repository pattern.** Data access is:
- **QSettings** for device identity and user settings (via `DeviceIdentity` and `Settings` classes)
- **HTTP GET** for ONNX model downloads (via `ModelDownloader`)
- **HTTP POST** for log forwarding (via `Logger`)
- **WebSocket** for all live server communication (via `PairionWebSocketClient`)

See Section 9 for the service-layer components that own these interactions.

## 9. Service / Business Logic Layer — Full Method Signatures

### PairionWebSocketClient (file: src/ws/pairion_websocket_client.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** QWebSocket, QTimer (heartbeat + reconnect), ConnectionState*

Public Methods:
- `PairionWebSocketClient(url, deviceId, bearerToken, connectionState, parent)` — Constructor
- `void connectToServer()` — Initiates WS connection
- `void disconnectFromServer()` — Disconnects and stops reconnect loop
- `void sendMessage(const OutboundMessage &msg)` — Serializes via EnvelopeCodec and sends text frame
- `void sendBinaryFrame(const QByteArray &data)` — Sends raw binary frame (4-byte prefix + Opus payload)
- `bool isConnected() const` — Returns socket state
- `void setHeartbeatIntervalMs(int ms)` — Test override for heartbeat interval

Private Slots: `onConnected()`, `onDisconnected()`, `onTextMessageReceived()`, `onBinaryMessageReceived()`, `onHeartbeatTick()`, `onReconnectTick()`

Signals: `sessionOpened(sessionId, serverVersion)`, `sessionClosed(reason)`, `serverError(code, message)`, `disconnected()`, `inboundMessage(msg)`, `binaryFrameReceived(data)`, `transcriptPartialReceived(text)`, `transcriptFinalReceived(text)`, `agentStateReceived(state)`, `llmTokenReceived(delta)`, `audioStreamStartOutReceived(streamId)`, `audioStreamEndOutReceived(streamId, reason)`

Behavior: On connect → sends DeviceIdentify. Parses all InboundMessage types via EnvelopeCodec, dispatches to ConnectionState and specific signals. Heartbeat at 15s cadence. Exponential backoff reconnect: 1→2→4→8→15→30s (6 steps, then capped at 30s).

---

### AudioSessionOrchestrator (file: src/pipeline/audio_session_orchestrator.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** PairionAudioCapture*, PairionOpusEncoder* (×2: main + pre-roll), PairionAudioPlayback*, OpenWakewordDetector*, SileroVad*, PairionWebSocketClient*, ConnectionState*

Public Methods:
- `State state() const` — Current FSM state

Public Slots:
- `void startListening()` — Transitions to AwaitingWake, wires signal connections
- `void shutdown()` — Stops pipeline, disconnects signals

Signals: `wakeFired(streamId)`, `streamEnded(streamId)`, `pipelineError(message)`

FSM Transitions:
- `Idle` → `AwaitingWake`: on `startListening()`
- `AwaitingWake` → `Streaming`: on `wakeWordDetected` signal — sends WakeWordDetected + AudioStreamStart, begins Opus frame forwarding
- `Streaming` → `EndingSpeech`: on `speechEnded` from VAD — sends SpeechEnded
- `EndingSpeech` → `Idle` (via `streamEnded`): after server AudioStreamEnd acknowledgement or timeout
- Any state → `Idle`: on WS disconnect (`onWsDisconnected`)
- `Idle` → `AwaitingWake`: on WS reconnect (`onWsReconnected`)

Private Slots: `onWakeWordDetected()`, `onSpeechEnded()`, `onOpusFrameEncoded()`, `onStreamingTimeout()`, `onInboundAudio()`, `onInboundAudioStreamStart()`, `onInboundStreamEnd()`, `onTtsPlaybackStarted()`, `onWsDisconnected()`, `onWsReconnected()`, `onPipelineError()`

---

### PipelineHealthMonitor (file: src/pipeline/pipeline_health_monitor.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** PairionWebSocketClient*, PairionAudioCapture*, QThread* (encoder + inference), AudioSessionOrchestrator*, ConnectionState*

Public Slots:
- `void start()` — Connects to audio frame signal, schedules initial check at 5s
- `void performHealthCheck()` — Single check pass: WS connectivity, mic capture, thread liveness, audio frame flow, orchestrator state → updates ConnectionState.pipelineHealth

Signals: `healthChanged(health)`

Checks: WebSocket connected, capture running, encoder/inference threads running, audio frames within 5s, orchestrator not null.

---

### DeviceIdentity (file: src/core/device_identity.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** QSettings

Public Methods:
- `DeviceIdentity(parent)` — Loads or generates UUID device ID + bearer token via QSettings
- `DeviceIdentity(deviceId, bearerToken, parent)` — Test constructor with explicit values
- `const QString &deviceId() const`
- `const QString &bearerToken() const`

Private: `void loadOrCreate()` — Checks QSettings for existing credentials; generates fresh UUIDs if absent

---

### ModelDownloader (file: src/core/model_downloader.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** QNetworkAccessManager*

Public Methods:
- `void checkAndDownload()` — Reads manifest, checks cached SHA-256, downloads missing/corrupt models
- `static QString modelCacheDir()` — Returns QStandardPaths::AppDataLocation + "/models"
- `static QString modelPath(name)` — Returns modelCacheDir() + "/" + name

Signals: `downloadProgress(percent)`, `allModelsReady()`, `downloadError(reason)`

Models managed (from resources/model_manifest.json):
- `melspectrogram.onnx` — openWakeWord mel spectrogram model
- `embedding_model.onnx` — openWakeWord embedding model
- `hey_jarvis_v0.1.onnx` — openWakeWord "Hey Jarvis" classifier
- `silero_vad.onnx` — Silero VAD v5

---

### OrtInferenceSession (file: src/core/onnx_session.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** onnxruntime (Pimpl via `Impl`)

Interface: `OnnxInferenceSession` (abstract base for testability)
- `explicit OrtInferenceSession(const std::string &modelPath)` — Loads ONNX model; throws std::runtime_error on failure
- `std::vector<OnnxOutput> run(inputs, outputNames)` — Synchronous inference; call from worker thread

---

### OpenWakewordDetector (file: src/wake/open_wakeword_detector.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** OnnxInferenceSession* (mel, embedding, classifier sessions)

Public Slots:
- `void warmup()` — Pre-warms pipeline with silence frames
- `void processPcmFrame(const QByteArray &pcm20ms)` — Processes 640-byte frame; runs mel→emb→cls pipeline

Signal: `wakeWordDetected(float score, const QByteArray &preRollBuffer)` — emitted when classifier score exceeds threshold

Pipeline: 1280-sample chunks + 480-sample context → mel rows → rolling emb buffer (16 features of 96 floats) → classifier. 500ms false-wake suppression window.

---

### SileroVad (file: src/vad/silero_vad.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** OnnxInferenceSession*

Public Slots:
- `void processPcmFrame(const QByteArray &pcm20ms)` — Accumulates to 512 samples, runs Silero v5 inference with recurrent state
- `void reset()` — Resets FSM and recurrent state

Signals: `speechStarted()`, `speechEnded()`

FSM: Idle → Speaking (on speech probability > threshold) → Trailing (on silence) → Idle (after silenceEndMs of trailing silence).

---

### Logger (file: src/util/logger.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** QNetworkAccessManager*, QMutex (thread-safe buffer)

Public Methods:
- `explicit Logger(nam, baseUrl, parent)`
- `void install()` — Installs Qt message handler via `qInstallMessageHandler`, starts 30s flush timer
- `void setSessionId(const QString &sessionId)` — Includes in batched records
- `void setLogCallback(std::function<void(QString)> cb)` — Feeds debug panel
- `void flush()` — Immediate POST /v1/logs with buffered records
- `QJsonArray pendingRecords() const` — For testing
- `int pendingCount() const`
- `static void messageHandler(...)` — Static Qt message handler

Private: `enqueue(LogRecord)` — Thread-safe buffer append; `levelString(QtMsgType)` → TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR

---

### PairionAudioCapture (file: src/audio/pairion_audio_capture.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** QAudioSource, QMediaDevices (main thread only)

Public Slots: `start()`, `stop()`, `configure(deviceId, sampleRate)`
Signal: `audioFrameAvailable(QByteArray pcm20ms)` — 640 bytes, 16-bit signed mono 16 kHz
Signal: `captureError(reason)`

Produces exact 20ms frames by accumulating QAudioSource's variable-size push into a 640-byte accumulator.

---

### PairionOpusEncoder (file: src/audio/pairion_opus_encoder.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** libopus (OpusEncoder*)

Runs on EncoderThread. 28 kbps, complexity 5, VOIP application mode.
Public Slot: `encodePcmFrame(pcm20ms)` → emits `opusFrameEncoded(opusFrame)` or `encoderError(reason)`

---

### PairionAudioPlayback (file: src/audio/pairion_audio_playback.h/.cpp)
**Dependencies:** QAudioSink (48 kHz, 5s buffer), PairionOpusDecoder, QTimer (silence/drain)

Public: `start()`, `stop()`, `preparePlayback()`
Public Slots: `handleOpusFrame(opusFrame)`, `handlePcmFrame(pcm)`, `handleStreamEnd(reason)`
Signals: `playbackError(message)`, `speakingStateChanged(state)` — "speaking" / "idle"

---

### EnvelopeCodec (file: src/protocol/envelope_codec.h/.cpp)
Stateless, thread-safe.
- `static QJsonObject serialize(OutboundMessage)` — Variant dispatch to JSON
- `static QString serializeToString(OutboundMessage)`
- `static std::optional<InboundMessage> deserialize(QJsonObject)` — Type-discriminated via "type" field
- `static std::optional<InboundMessage> deserializeFromString(QString)`

---

### BinaryCodec (file: src/protocol/binary_codec.h/.cpp)
Stateless.
- `static QByteArray encodeBinaryFrame(streamId, opusPayload)` — 4-byte UUID prefix + payload
- `static DecodedBinaryFrame decodeBinaryFrame(frame)` — Split at kPrefixLength=4
- `static QByteArray streamIdToPrefix(streamId)` — First 4 bytes of UUID RFC 4122 big-endian

## 10. Controller / Handler / Route Layer

**N/A — no REST controllers, no HTTP server, no route layer.** This is a desktop Qt client. The equivalent of the controller layer is the QML UI responding to ConnectionState property changes, and the `PairionWebSocketClient` dispatching inbound messages.

**QML entry points and their C++ signal handlers:**

| QML Component | ConnectionState Binding | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `LayerManager.qml` | `onActiveBackgroundIdChanged` | Loads background QML plugin |
| `LayerManager.qml` | `onActiveOverlayIdsChanged` | Syncs overlay QML stack |
| `LayerManager.qml` | `onSceneDataChanged` | Propagates data to backgrounds/overlays |
| `LayerManager.qml` | `onBackgroundParamsChanged` | Forwards params to current background |
| `TranscriptStrip.qml` | `transcriptPartial/Final` binding | Displays STT text |
| `PipelineHealthIndicator.qml` | `pipelineHealth` binding | Shows health status |
| `RingSystem.qml` | `agentState`, `voiceState` bindings | Animates rings |
| `Main.qml` | Keyboard shortcuts | B (cycle background), A (ADS-B), W (weather radar), F12 (debug), Escape (quit) |

## 11. Security Configuration

```
Authentication:       Bearer token — UUID generated on first launch, stored in QSettings.
                      Sent in DeviceIdentify WS message as "bearerToken" field.
Token validator:      Server-side (Pairion Server validates on SessionOpened)
Password hashing:     N/A — no user passwords; device uses UUID bearer token
HTTPS/TLS:            NOT enforced — server URL is ws:// (plaintext) in development (localhost).
                      Production would require wss:// server URL.

Public endpoints:     N/A — no HTTP server exposed by client
Protected endpoints:  N/A

CORS:                 N/A — not applicable to WS client
CSRF:                 N/A
Rate limiting:        N/A — client-side; server enforces

Credential storage:   QSettings (platform-native: macOS plist, Windows registry)
Sensitive data in logs: None detected — bearer token not logged anywhere in source
```

**Security notes:**
- Server URL and REST base URL are hardcoded as `localhost` in `constants.h` — development configuration. Production deployment requires reconfiguration.
- Model downloads use SHA-256 hash verification before use (ModelDownloader::verifyFile).
- No secrets in config files, no hardcoded passwords.
- Mic permission requested via macOS QPermission API — proper OS permission flow.

## 12. Custom Security Components

**No custom auth middleware or filter chain** — this is a desktop client, not a server.

The credential lifecycle is:

```
=== DeviceIdentity (file: src/core/device_identity.h) ===
Type:                    QObject-based credential manager
Purpose:                 Loads or generates UUID device ID + bearer token on first launch
Credentials stored via:  QSettings (platform-native storage)
Credential used in:      PairionWebSocketClient constructor → DeviceIdentify WS message
Validation:              Server-side only; client does not validate the token itself
```

## 13. Exception / Error Handling

**No global exception handler** — C++ exception handling is localized.

**Error handling patterns:**

```
=== ONNX Model Load (main.cpp: initAudioPipeline) ===
Mechanism:        try/catch std::exception on OrtInferenceSession constructor
Error response:   Retry up to 3 times with 1s delay; on exhaustion → pipelineHealth="models_failed"
User surface:     appendLog("[CRITICAL] ONNX model load failed after all retries...")

=== Thread Lifecycle (main.cpp) ===
Mechanism:        QThread::finished signal connected to critical log + appendLog
Error response:   Log CRITICAL, surface to debug panel; no auto-restart
User surface:     appendLog("[CRITICAL] Inference/Encoder thread exited...")

=== Pipeline Errors (AudioSessionOrchestrator) ===
Mechanism:        onPipelineError(reason) slot — central error handler
Error response:   Log, stop active stream, transition to Idle, emit pipelineError signal
User surface:     Connected to ConnectionState::appendLog("[ERROR] Pipeline: ...")

=== Capture Errors (PairionAudioCapture) ===
Signal:           captureError(reason)
Error response:   Connected to ConnectionState::appendLog("[ERROR] Microphone: ...")

=== WS Errors (PairionWebSocketClient) ===
Mechanism:        onDisconnected() → scheduleReconnect() with exponential backoff
                  onTextMessageReceived() → EnvelopeCodec::deserializeFromString returns nullopt on parse error → logs warning
User surface:     ConnectionState status updated; debug panel shows connection state

=== Model Download Errors (ModelDownloader) ===
Signal:           downloadError(reason)
Error response:   Connected to ConnectionState::appendLog("[ERROR] Model download: ...")

=== Playback Errors (PairionAudioPlayback) ===
Signal:           playbackError(message)
Error response:   Orchestrator connected — stops stream; log output
```

**Standard error format (log output):**
```
[LEVEL] Component: description
```
All logs routed through Logger to POST /v1/logs and ConnectionState::recentLogs (debug panel).

## 14. Mappers / Data Transformation

**No dedicated mapper layer.** Transformation is handled directly in EnvelopeCodec (Section 9):
- JSON text frames ↔ C++ message structs via `EnvelopeCodec::serialize` / `deserialize`
- Binary frames ↔ stream-ID + Opus payload via `BinaryCodec::encodeBinaryFrame` / `decodeBinaryFrame`
- ONNX tensor I/O handled inline in `OpenWakewordDetector` and `SileroVad` (raw float vectors)
- ConnectionState updates applied directly in `PairionWebSocketClient::onTextMessageReceived()` via `std::visit` on `InboundMessage` variant

## 15. Utility Modules & Shared Components

### Logger (file: src/util/logger.h)
Functions: `install()`, `setSessionId()`, `setLogCallback()`, `flush()`, `pendingRecords()`, `pendingCount()`
Used by: main.cpp (installed globally); all Q_LOGGING_CATEGORY output is captured

### RingBuffer (file: src/audio/ring_buffer.h)
Header-only lock-free ring buffer.
Used by: Audio pipeline buffering (pre-roll buffer in OpenWakewordDetector)

### OnnxTensor / OnnxOutput (file: src/core/onnx_session.h)
Plain structs for passing data to/from ONNX inference sessions.
Used by: OpenWakewordDetector, SileroVad

### BinaryCodec (file: src/protocol/binary_codec.h)
Stateless utility for audio binary frame encoding/decoding.
Functions: `encodeBinaryFrame()`, `decodeBinaryFrame()`, `streamIdToPrefix()`
Used by: AudioSessionOrchestrator (outbound frames), PairionWebSocketClient (inbound routing)

### LayerManager._toPascalCase (file: qml/HUD/LayerManager.qml)
QML function: converts hyphenated/underscored IDs to PascalCase for QML filename lookup.
`"weather_radar"` → `"WeatherRadar"` → `"WeatherRadarOverlay.qml"`

## 16. Database Schema (Live)

**N/A — no database.** This client has no database. Persistent storage is:
- **QSettings** (platform-native) for device credentials and user preferences
- **Filesystem** (`QStandardPaths::AppDataLocation/models/`) for ONNX model cache

## 17. Message Broker Configuration

**No message broker detected.** Real-time communication is via WebSocket directly to the Pairion Server. No RabbitMQ, Kafka, NATS, Redis Streams, or similar.

## 18. Cache Layer

**No caching layer detected.** The only "cache" is the ONNX model file cache on disk managed by `ModelDownloader` — this is a download cache, not an application data cache.

## 19. Environment Variable Inventory

**No environment variables used.** All configuration is compile-time constants or QSettings.

| Compile-time constant | File | Value | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `kDefaultServerUrl` | `src/core/constants.h` | `ws://localhost:18789/ws/v1` | Change for production |
| `kDefaultRestBaseUrl` | `src/core/constants.h` | `http://localhost:18789/v1` | Change for production |

**QSettings keys (runtime, persisted):**

| Key | Type | Default | Set by |
|---|---|---|---|
| `deviceId` | QString | generated UUID | DeviceIdentity::loadOrCreate() |
| `bearerToken` | QString | generated UUID | DeviceIdentity::loadOrCreate() |
| `wakeThreshold` | double | (implementation default) | Settings |
| `vadSilenceEndMs` | int | (implementation default) | Settings |
| `vadThreshold` | double | (implementation default) | Settings |
| `audioInputDevice` | QString | "" (system default) | Settings |
| `audioSampleRate` | int | (implementation default) | Settings |

## 20. Service Dependency Map

```
Pairion-Client → Depends On
----------------------------
Pairion Server (WebSocket):   ws://localhost:18789/ws/v1
  - Connects on startup
  - Sends: DeviceIdentify, HeartbeatPing, WakeWordDetected, AudioStreamStart/End, SpeechEnded, TextMessage
  - Receives: SessionOpened/Closed, HeartbeatPong, Error, AgentStateChange, TranscriptPartial/Final,
              LlmTokenStream, ToolCallStarted/Completed, AudioStreamStart/End, UnderBreathAck,
              MapFocus, MapClear, BackgroundChange, OverlayAdd/Remove/Clear, SceneDataPush

Pairion Server (REST):        http://localhost:18789/v1/logs
  - Batched structured log forwarding (POST every 30s or on flush)

openWakeWord GitHub Releases: https://github.com/dscripka/openWakeWord/releases/download/v0.5.1/
  - Downloads melspectrogram.onnx, embedding_model.onnx, hey_jarvis_v0.1.onnx (once, cached)

Silero VAD GitHub:            https://github.com/snakers4/silero-vad/raw/v5.1.2/...
  - Downloads silero_vad.onnx (once, cached)

RainViewer (tile API):        https://tilecache.rainviewer.com
  - Weather radar tiles fetched by WeatherRadarOverlay.qml (when active)

CartoCDN (OSM tiles):         https://{a,b,c}.basemaps.cartocdn.com
  - Dark matter tiles fetched by OsmBackground.qml (when active)

Downstream Consumers: None — client only
```

## 21. Known Technical Debt & Issues

### TODO/STUB Scan Results

```bash
grep -rn "TODO\|FIXME\|XXX\|HACK\|stub\|placeholder" --include="*.cpp" --include="*.h" --include="*.qml" . | grep -v build | grep -v ".git"
```

**Findings:**

| Issue | Location | Severity | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Stub overlay — zero implementation | `qml/Overlays/WeatherCurrentOverlay.qml` | CRITICAL | Empty Item with OverlayBase contract props only. No rendering code. Overlay is declared in the system but produces nothing. |
| Stub overlay — zero implementation | `qml/Overlays/MarkersOverlay.qml` | CRITICAL | Empty Item with OverlayBase contract props only. No rendering code. |
| Stub overlay — zero implementation | `qml/Overlays/NewsPinsOverlay.qml` | CRITICAL | Empty Item with OverlayBase contract props only. No rendering code. |
| "TODO" placeholder label in DashboardPanel C (Todo panel) | `qml/HUD/DashboardPanels.qml:87` | HIGH | Todo panel header reads "TODO" — panel content is all hardcoded placeholder text. Not server-driven. |
| Hardcoded placeholder data in DashboardPanels | `qml/HUD/DashboardPanels.qml` | HIGH | News, Inbox, Todo, and Homestead panels all use static hardcoded text. None is connected to ConnectionState or SceneDataPush. |
| Server URL hardcoded to localhost | `src/core/constants.h:21-24` | MEDIUM | `kDefaultServerUrl` and `kDefaultRestBaseUrl` are compile-time localhost. No runtime override mechanism. Must be changed for production deployment. |
| No TLS — WebSocket uses ws:// | `src/core/constants.h:21` | MEDIUM | All WS communication is unencrypted in development. Production requires wss://. |
| No CI/CD pipeline | Root | MEDIUM | No `.github/workflows` or equivalent. Test coverage enforcement and build checks are manual only. |
| Settings defaults not documented | `src/settings/settings.cpp` | LOW | Default values for wakeThreshold, vadSilenceEndMs, vadThreshold, audioSampleRate are in the .cpp not exposed in the .h; requires reading the .cpp to know defaults. |
| PairionScene/ QML components (legacy) | `qml/PairionScene/` | LOW | Legacy scene base components superseded by layer system. Dead code risk. |
| Scenes/ YAML descriptors (legacy) | `qml/Scenes/` | LOW | Legacy scene YAML files (dashboard, globe, space). Superseded by layer system. |

### Non-blocking Observations

| Issue | Location | Severity | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| No CI/CD | Project root | Medium | All quality gates (tests, coverage, Doxygen) must be run manually. |
| Wake/VAD on inference thread but comment notes may need profiling | `src/main.cpp:15` | Low | "move to worker thread at M2 if profiling shows main-thread pressure" — comment indicates planned follow-up |

```
Scan Date:        2026-04-26T15:25:52Z
Snyk CLI Version: 1.1303.0
```

### Dependency Vulnerabilities (Open Source)
```
Result: SKIPPED
Reason: Snyk CLI does not support C++/CMake projects via 'snyk test'.
        C++ projects have no supported package manifest file (no package.json, pom.xml, etc.).
        Snyk error: "No supported files found (SNYK-CLI-0008)"
Gap:    Dependency scanning for Qt6, libopus, and onnxruntime is not covered.
        Manual review: all three are mature, widely-used libraries with active security maintenance.
        Recommend: monitor CVE feeds for Qt6, libopus, and onnxruntime; evaluate OSV/Dependabot alternatives for C++.
```

### Code Vulnerabilities (SAST)
```
Result: NOT RUN
Reason: Snyk Code requires OSS scan to succeed first. C++ SAST via Snyk is in preview and
        requires a different workflow (upload/CI integration). Not run in this local scan.
Recommendation: Use clang-tidy (already enabled via -Wall -Wextra -Werror) and cppcheck for
                static analysis. Consider integrating Snyk Code via CI when CI is established.
```

### IaC Findings
```
Result: N/A — no Dockerfile, docker-compose, or Terraform files in this project.
```

### Manual Security Assessment

| Check | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Hardcoded secrets in source | PASS | No passwords/secrets in source or config files |
| Bearer token in logs | PASS | Bearer token not observed in any log statement |
| Sensitive data logging | PASS | No credential fields passed to log calls |
| SHA-256 model verification | PASS | ModelDownloader verifies all ONNX files before use |
| Input validation | PASS | All WS inbound messages parsed via typed codec with nullopt on failure |
| Memory safety | PASS | RAII throughout; Qt ownership model used correctly; no raw new without parent |
| Plaintext WS (ws://) | WARNING | Development-only; production requires wss:// |
| Localhost server URL | WARNING | Production requires reconfiguration; no runtime override |
